all_games.summary: Shota Imanaga dominated on the mound, striking out nine in six scoreless innings to lead the Pittsburgh Pirates to a 2-0 win over the Chicago Cubs. Bryan Reynolds' solo homer was the difference in the game.

Brandon Marsh's three-run homer in the top of the eighth inning proved to be the difference in the Arizona Diamondbacks' 5-4 win over the Philadelphia Phillies. The Diamondbacks' bullpen struggled to hold the lead, but ultimately came out on top.
Keider Montero pitched six scoreless innings to lead the Detroit Tigers to a 2-0 win over the Miami Marlins. Javier Báez's solo homer was the only run scored in the game.
The Los Angeles Angels' offense exploded for 10 runs, led by Jorge Soler's four RBIs, in a 10-2 win over the Cincinnati Reds. The Angels' bullpen pitched well in relief of the starter.
The Toronto Blue Jays' offense was too much for the Minnesota Twins, scoring 10 runs in a 10-4 win. Ryan Jeffers' three RBIs led the Twins' offense.
The Athletics' pitching staff shut out the New York Mets 4-0, with multiple pitchers contributing to the win. Jacob Wilson had three hits for the Athletics.

all_games.game: New York Yankees @ Tampa Bay Rays
all_games.summary: Yandy Díaz's two RBIs, including a homer, led the Tampa Bay Rays to a 5-3 win over the New York Yankees. Steven Matz pitched five strong innings for the Rays.
The San Francisco Giants' offense scored six runs, led by Willy Adames' two RBIs, in a 6-3 win over the Baltimore Orioles. The Giants' bullpen pitched well in relief of the starter.

all_games.top_batting_line: Ronald Acuña Jr.: 2 H, 1 HR, 2 RBI
all_games.summary: The Atlanta Braves' offense exploded for 11 runs, led by Ronald Acuña Jr.'s two RBIs, in an 11-5 win over the Cleveland Guardians. The Braves' bullpen pitched well in relief of the starter.

all_games.game: Chicago White Sox @ Kansas City Royals
all_games.summary: Kris Bubic pitched seven scoreless innings to lead the Kansas City Royals to a 2-0 win over the Chicago White Sox. Carter Jensen's solo homer was the only run scored in the game.
Jake Bauers' three RBIs, including a homer, led the Washington Nationals to a 7-3 win over the Milwaukee Brewers. Jake Irvin pitched five strong innings for the Nationals.

all_games.game: Boston Red Sox @ St. Louis Cardinals
all_games.summary: Connelly Early pitched four strong innings to lead the St. Louis Cardinals to a 3-2 win over the Boston Red Sox. The Cardinals' bullpen pitched well in relief of the starter.
Gavin Sheets' four RBIs, including two homers, led the San Diego Padres to a 5-2 win over the Colorado Rockies. The Padres' bullpen pitched well in relief of the starter.
Yordan Alvarez's three RBIs, including a homer, led the Seattle Mariners to a 9-6 win over the Houston Astros. Emerson Hancock pitched five strong innings for the Mariners.
Corey Seager's three RBIs, including a homer, led the Los Angeles Dodgers to an 8-7 win over the Texas Rangers. The Dodgers' bullpen pitched well in relief of the starter.
